title: decide_artifact
description: The ranked selection of actionable Kitsoki improvements, highest-value first.

selected.description: Chosen items, ranked by (# intents × mechanicalness × Kitsoki-adoption leverage).

artifact_kind.description: The artifact kind the author room must produce.

target_path.description: Exact room/script/skill/hook path to edit or create.

room.description: Exact room file path to edit (when applicable).

gate.description: One sentence naming the gate or deterministic script to install.

acceptance_gate.description: The no-LLM validation or human gate that proves the improvement is applied.

rationale.description: Why this ranking / why the top item first.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable decision delivered to the transport.
